case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. SYNDACON, INC.

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF PAYMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT SYNDACON, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SYNDACON, INC. $13,190.93 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,236.93, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( MAILED AS COURTESY )
